member.name: T:ScheduleId
member.summary:
The entity ID of a schedule transaction.
See Hedera Documentation

member.name: M:ScheduleId.#ctor(System.Int64)
member.param:
the num part
Constructor that uses shard, realm and num should be used instead as shard and realm should not assume 0 value

member.name: M:ScheduleId.FromString(System.String)
member.summary: Create a schedule id from a string.
member.param: the string representing the schedule id

member.name: M:ScheduleId.FromBytes(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Create a schedule id from a byte array.
member.exception: when there is an issue with the protobuf

member.name: M:ScheduleId.FromProtobuf(Proto.ScheduleID)
member.summary: Create a schedule id from a protobuf.

member.name: M:ScheduleId.ToProtobuf
member.returns: the protobuf representing the schedule id

member.name: M:ScheduleId.Validate(Client)
member.exception: if entity ID is formatted poorly

member.name: M:ScheduleId.ValidateChecksum(Client)
member.exception: if entity ID is formatted poorly

member.name: M:ScheduleId.ToStringWithChecksum(Client)
member.summary: Convert the schedule id into a string with checksum.
